news.t: These two ETFs have outperformed S&P 500 since 2021: should investors take notice?
Top 2 ETFs Joel Greenblatt Has Been Buying

holdings.infoBox: GSPY is an equity ETF with a total of 500 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.44%, NVIDIA at 7.29%, Microsoft at 5.15%, Alphabet at 4.83%, and Amazon.com at 4.60%.

overview.description: The Gotham Enhanced 500 ETF (GSPY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively seeks long-term capital appreciation by reweighting the components of the S&P 500 Index based on proprietary fundamental research. GSPY was launched on Dec 28, 2020 and is issued by Tidal.
